notes: Research-augmented historical backfill for the v7.6 ranking engine. Every leaf carries fidelity/source/as_of provenance; the loader (applyHistoricalMetricsOverride) extracts `.value` into tools.data.metrics.* and threads provenance into the persisted ranking row. reconstructed=true flags this as a synthetic period.

fidelity_levels.real: Directly retrieved from an external time-series API for this exact calendar month.
fidelity_levels.interpolated: Linear interpolation between two real dated anchor points (news/launch events + current snapshot).
fidelity_levels.held_flat: No time-series source exists; the last known real value is carried forward, explicitly flagged. Never a real monthly reading.
fidelity_levels.not_applicable: No value exists or is recoverable for this tool/metric/month.

downloads_last_month.recovery_note: Sum of daily npm downloads for calendar month 2025-12, retrieved live from the npm range API for @anthropic-ai/claude-code.

monthly_arr.source: Anthropic: Claude Code hit $1B annualized within ~6 months of mid-2025 launch
monthly_arr.recovery_note: No time-series API for ARR; held flat at the nearest dated anchor (2025-12). Not a real 2025-12 reading.

verified.recovery_note: No time-series API for SWE-bench Verified; held flat at the nearest dated anchor (2025-08). Not a real 2025-12 reading.

provenance.notes: Reconstructed metrics; see per-leaf fidelity/source/recovery_note.

users.source: Linear interpolation between dated anchors 2025-09 (Lovable 140K users (uuid-mappings: lovable-achieves-5-56m-arr)) and 2026-06 (Lovable ~8M users 2026 (getpanto))
users.recovery_note: user count has no monthly-history API; value linearly interpolated between two dated news anchors. Flagged interpolated so it can be down-weighted if stricter provenance is required.

monthly_arr.source: Linear interpolation between dated anchors 2025-11 (Lovable $200M ARR Nov 2025 (TechCrunch)) and 2026-01 (Lovable $300M ARR Jan 2026 (TechCrunch))
monthly_arr.recovery_note: ARR has no monthly-history API; value linearly interpolated between two dated news anchors. Flagged interpolated so it can be down-weighted if stricter provenance is required.

downloads_last_month.recovery_note: PyPI stats retain only a rolling ~180-day window; 2025-12 has rolled off (or the source was rate-limited). Poll monthly going forward rather than back-filling old months.

stars.source: https://api.github.com/repos/Aider-AI/aider (current stargazers_count=47416) linearly interpolated from repo creation 2023-05 (0 stars) to 2026-07
stars.recovery_note: GitHub's REST API returns only the current total; monthly history requires paginating stargazer timestamps or star-history.com. This is a documented linear-interpolation estimate.
